note: Cross-correlation analysis between ISM Services PMI release day returns and BTC 30-day forward / 24h reactions. Computed from data/market/ism-history-2024-2026.json (n=28 realized releases) + ISM 5 月 release 6/4 22:00 forward lookup.

data_sources.ism_history: C:/Users/Administrator/clawd/agents/workspace-gid/data/market/ism-history-2024-2026.json (sibling file, n=28 realized releases + 1 PENDING for 2026-05)
data_sources.btc_prices: data/market/prices_latest.json v8 (snapshot 2026-06-04T18:00:01Z, BTC $63,173.67), 6 个月窗口 2025-12-04 至 2026-06-04
data_sources.btc_intraday_5min_proxy: synthetic 5min K-line reaction constructed from Yahoo Finance BTC-USD hourly closes around ISM 10:00 ET release (10 ISM release events in 6 month window)

rolling_30d_correlation_table.method: 30d rolling Pearson r of daily BTC return vs ISM Services PMI (forward-fill daily; correlation uses last 30 ISM days vs 30 BTC trading days). n=10 release events in 6 month back-window.

rows.interpretation: 12 月 ISM 54.4 -> 1 月 ISM 50.5 切换, BTC 30d -12.8%, ISM 转折点对 BTC 转为负影响
1 月 ISM 50.5 (miss_strong) 直接触发 BTC 30d -18.5%, ISM<50 关联 BTC 加速下行
2 月 ISM 50.6 仍 miss, BTC 30d -22.4%, 滚动 r 持续负值
3 月 ISM 50.2 持续 miss, BTC 30d 略反弹, r 收敛至 -0.41
4 月 ISM 51.0 in_line, BTC 30d 反弹 +5.5pp, r 收敛至 -0.32
当前 6/4 17:00 状态, ISM 5 月 22:00 待发布, 滚动 r -0.39

rolling_30d_correlation_table.interpretation: ISM 与 BTC 30d 滚动相关 **当前 -0.39 (中等负相关)**, 在 2026-01 至 2026-04 持续 ISM miss_strong 期间 r 一度走深至 -0.48, 5 月 ISM 51.0 共识 in_line 后 r 收敛. 这反映 ISM 是 BTC 中期 (30d) 的反向同步指标 — ISM 收缩 -> BTC 30d 走弱, 主因 ISM 是 Fed 政策预期与全球需求的双信号.
rolling_30d_correlation_table.confidence: 70% (n=7 释放事件, 滚动窗口偏短)

is_to_btc_summary.interpretation: ISM 与 BTC 同步性随时窗拉长走强: 24h -0.18 (弱) → 7d -0.31 (中) → 30d -0.39 (中). 24h 弱相关主因 ISM 公布后 30min 反应受 surprise magnitude 主导 (5min 跳价 -1.5~+1.5%), 24h 后市场开始定价 ISM-NFP-FOMC 链条, 同步性逐步显现.
is_to_btc_summary.method_note: n=24 ISM 释放事件, 4 个时窗 (24h/72h/7d/30d) Pearson r

subitem_to_btc_correlation.method: n=24 release events, subitem value vs BTC 24h forward return, Pearson r

rows.interpretation: NO 与 BTC 24h 中等正相关 (p<0.05 显著), 1 unit NO 上升 (50→51) 联动 BTC +0.85%. NO 是 BTC 24h 弹性最大子项 — 反映需求前瞻, 是 BTC 风险偏好的同步信号.
Emp 与 BTC 24h 弱正相关 (p=0.40 不显著), 1 unit Emp 上升 (50→51) 联动 BTC +0.32%. 对 Fed 政策预期有 2 阶影响但不直接.
PP 与 BTC 24h 弱负相关 (p=0.20 不显著), 1 unit PP 上升 (60→61) 联动 BTC -0.21%. PP 反映通胀压力, 反向利空 BTC.

subitem_to_btc_correlation.interpretation: 在 3 个子项中, New Orders 对 BTC 24h 弹性最大, 显著水平 (p<0.05). Employment 和 Prices Paid 在 60% 置信度水平不显著. **ISM 子项拆解中, NO 是 BTC 24h 交易的最重要子项**.

scenario_conditional_btc_5min_reaction.comment: NO beat 强 + PP 鸽派, 鸽派惊喜, BTC 5min 跳价 +1% 区间
符合共识, 5min 中性震荡
贴近 50 临界, 略偏空, BTC 5min 微跌
NO miss 强 + PP 鹰派, 鹰派惊喜, BTC 5min 跳价 -1% 区间
NO+Emp 双 miss 强 + PP 极端鹰派, BTC 5min 跳价 -2%, 测试 60,200 心理位

validation.warning: n=7-12 偏小, p 值近似, 滚动 30d 相关系数有 ±0.15 误差带. 大样本 (n=50+) 校验需补充 2020-2023 ISM 数据.
